mapper.select: SELECT m.*, a.activity_name, a.class_full_name, a.grade_name, class_info.class_name, sys_user.nick_name as monitor_name FROM activity_monitor m LEFT JOIN activity a ON m.activity_id = a.activity_id Left Join class_info on a.class_id = class_info.class_id left join sys_user on m.monitor_by = sys_user.user_id ORDER BY m.monitor_id DESC
